user_query: I want to organize a fun game night with my friends. Please suggest some interesting pictionary words with a moderate difficulty level. Additionally, provide a random charades word for us to play. Oh, and could you also give me an overview of the current market for blockchain games, including the market cap and trading volume? Thanks!

TaskList.description: Get a list of interesting Pictionary words with a moderate difficulty level.
Provide a random charades word for the game.
Fetch an overview of the current market for blockchain games, including the market cap and trading volume.
